summary: P0 Login Bug Fix Verification Complete. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: Parent/School login successfully navigates to /portal, Admin login successfully navigates to /admin. The critical NameError bug (get_current_brand_partner defined after usage) has been fixed - backend now returns proper responses instead of 502.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 BUG FIX VERIFIED: get_current_brand_partner function was moved before line 2498 where it's first used in brand coupon routes
POST /api/auth/login correctly returns access_token for both guardian and admin roles
Login response includes all required fields: access_token, token_type, user object with id, email, full_name, role, wallet_balance, referral_code
POST /api/auth/register correctly creates new guardian users with auto-generated referral code
GET /api/students with valid token returns 200 with array (empty for new users, populated for existing)
GET /api/auth/me correctly returns current authenticated user
Frontend GuardianLogin.jsx correctly routes based on role: admin->admin, guardian->portal, teacher->teacher-portal, brand_partner->brand-portal
Frontend ProtectedRoute uses localStorage fallback to prevent login cycling issue
Parent Portal shows all 5 tabs: Students, Marketplace, Wallet, Invite & Earn, Progress
Admin Dashboard shows all statistics cards: Parents, Teachers, Students, Recent Signups, Word Banks, Stories, etc.
seed_data_creation: Created test user testparent_iteration17@example.com for registration->login flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 login bug is FIXED. The root cause was a Python NameError - get_current_brand_partner function was defined at line 3513 but used at line 2498, causing FastAPI server to crash with 502 on startup. Fix: function definition moved before first usage. Both Parent/School (guardian) and Admin login flows now work correctly with proper role-based navigation.

frontend_ui_tests: Landing page Parent/School Login button - PASSED
Login page shows 'PARENT / SCHOOL LOGIN' title - PASSED
Guardian login with valid credentials - PASSED
Guardian redirected to /portal after login - PASSED (P0 FIX VERIFIED)
Parent Portal shows 5 tabs (Students, Marketplace, Wallet, Invite & Earn, Progress) - PASSED
Admin login with valid credentials - PASSED
Admin redirected to /admin after login - PASSED

p0_login_bug.root_cause: NameError: get_current_brand_partner defined at line 3513, used at line 2498
p0_login_bug.fix: Function definition moved before first usage
p0_login_bug.guardian_login: FIXED - Returns 200 with access_token instead of 502
p0_login_bug.registration: WORKING - Creates user and subsequent login works

portal_tabs.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Shows statistics with Parents, Teachers, Students counts

ai_integration.note: No AI integration tested in this iteration - focus was on login bug fix verification
